sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73251" key="o(lo/mestos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλό-μεστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73251.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">solid, without marrow,</tr_> of bones, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0726.tlg001:12:286" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.286</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
